name: Upside-Down Rhubarb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine melted butter, rhubarb, and brown sugar. Mix well.
2. Place the mixture in 12 greased muffin cups.
3. Beat together butter, sugar, and eggs until fluffy.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with milk, stirring just until moistened.
6. Spoon the batter on top of the rhubarb mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Invert the pan over the muffins and let sit for a few minutes so that all the rhubarb juices run out before serving warm.
